title: cirsium × benzii
intro: Cirsium × benzii, also known as the meadow sage thistle, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is a cross between Cirsium horridulum and Cirsium discolor. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Consuming the plant's flowers and leaves can provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Cirsium × benzii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
